s: In 2012, Carter Capps suited up for SEA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.960, WHIP 1.440, SO 28, WAR 0.500.
In 2013, Carter Capps suited up for SEA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.490, WHIP 1.630, SO 66, WAR -0.300.

In 2015, Carter Capps suited up for MIA as a two_way. Key numbers: AVG 0.500, OPS 1.000, HR 0, RBI 0, WAR 1.300.
Changed teams after the previous season (MIA -> SDP).
In 2017, Carter Capps suited up for SDP as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 6.570, WHIP 1.140, SO 7, WAR 0.000. Notable context: Joined SDP.
